version_description:
v0: Initial creation — Returning Patient scheduling sub-agent

=== Flow Structure ===
- 9 scheduling components migrated from Base Agent: Name, DOB, Callback, Reason for Visit, Urgency, Provider Preference, Schedule Preference, Insurance Coverage, Finalization
- 4 global components: Emergency Detection (global trigger), Transfer To Human (global trigger), End Call (global trigger), End Call (TTH exits)
- Routing: Start → Name → DOB → Callback → Reason for Visit → Urgency → Provider Preference → Schedule Preference → Insurance Coverage → Finalization → agent_swap back to Base
- Callback bail-out paths: Logic Split routes to End Call (call back later) or Callback Promise (clinic calls back)

=== Consistency with NP/RA/CA ===
- TTH exit conditions use equation type (tth_exit_reason == callback/end_call/continue)
- Finalization Summary & Confirmation uses conversational style matching NP/RA
- Callback edge prompts standardized: 'Caller wants to call back later when ready' / 'Caller wants someone from the clinic to call them back'

=== Test Results ===
- 13/13 dedicated RP tests pass (happy path, fallbacks, corrections, edge cases, global triggers, callbacks)
- 8/8 Base Agent integration tests pass (round trip, post-scheduling, bail-out)
